No Poverty.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to eradicating poverty.

Zero Hunger.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to ending hunger or improving food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course is 'Physical Education' and aims to 'improve volleyball athletic ability and knowledge,' directly promoting physical activity and well-being, aligning with Target 3.4 (prevention of non-communicable diseases).
evidence: 增進排球運動能力與知識

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3). It also develops 'basic skills and techniques' and 'teamwork spirit,' which are relevant skills (Target 4.4).
evidence: 展現團隊合作精神及競賽能力

Gender Equality.reason: The course is explicitly '男女合班' (man and woman), ensuring equal participation in sports education, directly supporting non-discrimination and equal opportunities (Targets 5.1, 5.5).
